s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER SIDE RETAINER LH

s2.ptxt: Engage the claw and install the front bumper side retainer LH.
Install the screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER SIDE RETAINER RH
INSTALL FRONT BUMPER REINFORCEMENT SUB-ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front bumper reinforcement sub-assembly with the 6 bolts.
Engage each clamp.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER ENERGY ABSORBER

s2.ptxt: Install the front bumper energy absorber to the front bumper reinforcement sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RADIATOR GRILLE EMBLEM

s2.ptxt: Engage the 4 claws and install the radiator grille emblem.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER UPPER RETAINER

s2.ptxt: Install the front bumper upper retainer with the 3 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL HOOD TO FRONT END PANEL SEAL

s2.ptxt: Apply new double-sided tape to the hood to front end panel seal.
Remove the release paper from the hood to front end panel seal.
Install the hood to front end panel seal with the 10 clips.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL RADIATOR GRILLE

s2.ptxt: Engage the 16 claws and install the radiator grille.
Install the 2 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL LOWER RADIATOR GRILLE

s2.ptxt: Engage the 14 claws and install the lower radiator grille.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER LH (w/o Fog Light)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and install the front bumper hole cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER RH (w/o Fog Light)
INSTALL FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER LH (w/ Fog Light)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and install the front bumper hole cover LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER HOLE COVER RH (w/ Fog Light)
INSTALL FRONT BUMPER LOWER COVER (w/ Cover)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and install the front bumper lower cover.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER EXTENSION MOUNTING BRACKET (w/ Bracket)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 2 claws and install the front bumper extension mounting bracket.
Install the 2 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER EXTENSION LH (w/ Front Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Install the front bumper extension LH with the 2 nuts.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT BUMPER EXTENSION RH (w/ Front Spoiler)
INSTALL FRONT SPOILER (w/ Front Spoiler)

s2.ptxt: Engage the 17 claws and install the front spoiler.
Install the 25 clips and 2 screws.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FOG LIGHT ASSEMBLY LH (w/ Fog Light)

s2.ptxt: Install the fog light assembly with the screw.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FOG LIGHT ASSEMBLY RH (w/ Fog Light)
